name: kaito-mcp-server
description: Crypto market intelligence from Kaito AI — sentiment, mindshare, social analytics, rankings, and more.

api_key.title: Kaito API Key
api_key.description: Your Kaito API key. Get one at https://kaito.ai

tools.name: kaito_entities
tools.description: List or search supported Kaito token identifiers, symbols, and project names

tools.name: kaito_feeds
tools.description: Structured top-content Kaito feed for discovery and monitoring

tools.name: kaito_narratives
tools.description: List or search supported narrative IDs and display names

tools.name: kaito_advanced_search
tools.description: Advanced structured Kaito search for highly specific retrieval

tools.name: kaito_tweet_engagement_info
tools.description: Detailed engagement metrics for a specific tweet

tools.name: kaito_sentiment_entity
tools.description: Daily sentiment time series for a token

tools.name: kaito_engagement
tools.description: Daily engagement metrics for a token or keyword

tools.name: kaito_mentions
tools.description: Daily mention counts for a token or keyword

tools.name: kaito_mindshare_entity
tools.description: Daily mindshare time series for a token

tools.name: kaito_mindshare_entity_delta
tools.description: Top gainers and losers by mindshare change

tools.name: kaito_smart_following_market
tools.description: Accounts that smart followers have recently followed

tools.name: kaito_smart_followers
tools.description: Smart follower data for a Twitter user

tools.name: kaito_smart_following
tools.description: Latest smart accounts followed by a Twitter user

tools.name: kaito_mindshare_entity_by_account
tools.description: Top KOLs ranked by mindshare for a token

tools.name: kaito_twitter_user_metadata
tools.description: Twitter user profile metadata by user ID

tools.name: kaito_events
tools.description: Upcoming catalyst events for a token

tools.name: kaito_mindshare_narrative
tools.description: Daily mindshare for a crypto narrative
